untranslatable_reason: Signal requires comparison of implied volatility skew between OTM and ITM puts (volatility term structure), which is not available in the allowed indicators. India_vix and hvol_20 measure absolute volatility levels but cannot capture the specific IV skew distortion required for this spread strategy. Strike selection logic and IV skew detection require options-specific data not in the indicator set.
translation_notes: This is a volatility skew arbitrage signal requiring options IV data. Entry uses HIGH_VOL regime proxy. The core condition—'OTM puts have higher IV than ITM puts'—cannot be expressed with available price-based indicators. Exit at expiration cannot be translated to a price/indicator condition and uses placeholder ANY. Manual position management or options-specific data feed required.
